Fields: Quarter | Ticket demand | Staffed capacity | Capacity gap Negative gap means demand exceeds staffed capacity. Source workbook: source_metrics.xlsx / capacity_forecast
Do not edit: native chart package invariant This slide exists to detect collateral damage across turns. It must remain text-identical to the seed deck.
CUIF focus: editable native chart + layout constraints

parsed.rationale: Slide 1 satisfies the required dashboard layout: a large readable clustered column chart is placed on the left, a top-right data-cut badge is present, a right-side observation rail is present, and an insight strip sits below the chart. The artifact summary indicates 1 chart and 0 images, which supports that this is a native editable chart rather than a screenshot shortcut. Visual inspection shows the chart is readable and there is no obvious overlap among title, chart, badge, observation box, legend, or insight strip. Minor deduction only because the chart/legend area is somewhat dense vertically, but it still meets the rubric clearly.

columns.instruction: Using the seed deck, source_metrics.xlsx, source_metrics.csv, analyst_notes.txt, and layout_reference.svg, create a three-slide support capacity forecast deck. Slide 1 must follow the layout reference with the title "Support Capacity Forecast", the subtitle "Ticket demand vs staffed capacity from source_metrics.xlsx", and a native editable PowerPoint clustered column chart named "support_capacity_clustered_chart". The chart must use categories Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4, with series "Ticket demand" values 1180, 1285, 1420, 1580 and "Staffed capacity" values 1220, 1320, 1460, 1510. Do not paste a screenshot of a chart. Add the exact caption "Chart caption: quarterly ticket demand and staffed support capacity" below the chart. Slide 2 should be a source audit containing the exact strings "Workbook audit", "Source data: support capacity forecast", "Q1 1180 1220 +40", "Q2 1285 1320 +35", "Q3 1420 1460 +40", and "Q4 1580 1510 -70". Preserve slide 3 exactly because it contains the sentinel "Do not edit: native chart package invariant".
columns.label: Turn 1

columns.instruction: Finalize the turn 1 deck using style_reference.svg. On slide 1, style the title "Support Capacity Forecast" as CUIF blue #1F4E79, bold, and 34 pt. Keep the native chart named "support_capacity_clustered_chart" editable and keep the chart data unchanged. Keep the chart in the large left chart region, add a top-right badge with "Data cut: FY2026 forecast", add a right observation rail containing exactly "Capacity observations", "Leader: Q4 demand 1580", "Gap: Q4 -70 tickets", and "Mitigation: shift 2 weekend pods", and add the insight strip "Insight: Q4 demand exceeds staffed capacity by 70 tickets; mitigation should shift two weekend pods before launch." under the chart. Preserve slide 2 exactly from turn 1 and preserve slide 3 exactly.
columns.label: Final
